ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, the virtual linker will also include aliases for the files.
ast.target: 如果激活，虚拟链接器也将包含文件的别名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, there will not be several identical virtual links in the same note (Wikipedia style).
ast.target: 如果激活，同一笔记中不会出现多个相同的虚拟链接（维基百科风格）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, there will be no links to files that are already linked in the note by real links.
ast.target: 如果激活，将不会链接到笔记中已通过真实链接链接的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, headers (so your lines beginning with at least one `#`) are included for virtual links.
ast.target: 如果激活，标题（即以至少一个 `#` 开头的行）将包含在虚拟链接中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If deactivated, only whole words are matched. Otherwise, every part of a word is found.
ast.target: 如果停用，仅匹配完整单词。否则，会找到单词的每个部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, the beginnings of words are also linked, even if it is not a whole match.
ast.target: 如果激活，即使不是完整匹配，也会链接单词的开头部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, the ends of words are also linked, even if it is not a whole match.
ast.target: 如果激活，即使不是完整匹配，也会链接单词的结尾部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, the suffix is not added to links for subwords, but only for complete matches.
ast.target: 如果激活，仅对完整匹配添加后缀，而不对子单词添加。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, there will be no links in the current line start which is followed immediately by the Input Method Editor (IME). This is the recommended setting if you are using IME (input method editor) for typing, e.g. for chinese characters, because instant linking might interfere with IME.
ast.target: 如果激活，在当前行开头紧随输入法编辑器（IME）的位置将不会创建链接。如果您正在使用 IME（例如用于输入中文字符），这是推荐设置，因为即时链接可能会干扰 IME。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, there will be no links in the current line.
ast.target: 如果激活，当前行中将不会创建链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activated, the matching is case sensitive.
ast.target: 如果激活，匹配将区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The percentage (0 - 100) of capital letters in a file name or alias to be automatically considered as case sensitive.
ast.target: 文件名或别名中大写字母的百分比（0 - 100），超过此值将自动视为区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By adding this tag to a file, the linker will ignore the case for the file.
ast.target: 将此标签添加到文件后，链接器将忽略该文件的大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By adding this tag to a file, the linker will match the case for the file.
ast.target: 将此标签添加到文件后，链接器将匹配该文件的大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By adding this property to a note, containing a list of names, the linker will ignore the case for the specified names / aliases. This way you can decide, which alias should be insensitive.
ast.target: 通过将此属性添加到包含名称列表的笔记中，链接器将忽略指定名称/别名的大小写。这样您可以决定哪些别名应不区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By adding this property to a note, containing a list of names, the linker will match the case for the specified names / aliases. This way you can decide, which alias should be case sensitive.
ast.target: 通过将此属性添加到包含名称列表的笔记中，链接器将匹配指定名称/别名的大小写。这样您可以决定哪些别名应区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include all files for the virtual linker.
ast.target: 为虚拟链接器包含所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directories to include for the virtual linker (separated by new lines).
ast.target: 为虚拟链接器包含的目录（以换行分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directories from which files are to be excluded for the virtual linker (separated by new lines). Files in these directories will not create any virtual links in other files.
ast.target: 为虚拟链接器排除文件的目录（以换行分隔）。这些目录中的文件不会在其他文件中创建任何虚拟链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to explicitly include the file for the linker.
ast.target: 用于显式包含文件以供链接器使用的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to ignore the file for the linker.
ast.target: 用于忽略文件以供链接器使用的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled, links to the note itself are excluded from the linker. (This might not work in preview windows.)
ast.target: 如果启用，链接器将排除指向笔记自身的链接。（这在预览窗口中可能不起作用。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directories in which the plugin will not create virtual links (separated by new lines).
ast.target: 插件不会在其中创建虚拟链接的目录（以换行分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled, if there are multiple matching notes, all references are shown behind the match. If not toggled, the references are only shown if hovering over the match.
ast.target: 如果启用，当存在多个匹配笔记时，所有引用都会显示在匹配项后面。如果未启用，则仅在悬停在匹配项上时才显示引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The suffix to add to auto generated virtual links.
ast.target: 添加到自动生成的虚拟链接的后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The suffix to add to auto generated virtual links for aliases.
ast.target: 添加到为别名自动生成的虚拟链接的后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled, the default link styling will be applied to virtual links. Furthermore, you can style the links yourself with a CSS-snippet affecting the class `virtual-link`. (Find the CSS snippet directory at Appearance -> CSS Snippets -> Open snippets folder)
ast.target: 如果启用，将对虚拟链接应用默认链接样式。此外，您可以通过影响类 `virtual-link` 的 CSS 代码片段自行设置链接样式。（在外观 -> CSS 代码片段 -> 打开代码片段文件夹中找到 CSS 代码片段目录）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled, the default link style will be used for the conversion of virtual links to real links.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用默认链接样式将虚拟链接转换为真实链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled, the virtual links will be created as wiki-links instead of markdown links.
ast.target: 如果启用，虚拟链接将创建为 wiki 链接而不是 markdown 链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format of the generated links.
ast.target: 生成链接的格式。
